---
title: "Appendix: Acknowledgement of Generative AI Use"
author: "Sinping CHAN"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo       
    toc: true
    embed-resources: true 
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    colorlinks: true
---

### **Appendix: Acknowledgement of Generative AI Use**

I acknowledge the use of \[1\] Gemini 3 Flash \[2\] ([https://gemini.google.com/](https://gemini.google.com/?authuser=3)) and \[1\] Claude Sonnet 4.6 \[2\] (<https://claude.ai/)> to \[3\] generate ideas, structure suggestions, draft initial outlines and rewrite text, and provide code enhancements that were \[3\] included within my final assessment in modified form. I entered the following prompts on 9 April 2026:

-   \[3\] Structure the "Dataset Introduction" and "Dataset Description" sections to ensure a professional distinction between business context and technical data details. \[4\] I edited the drafts to ensure the specific dates (Sept 2024 – Feb 2026) and customer segments accurately reflected my dataset.

-   \[3\] Refine the academic style, English phrasing, and professional terminology throughout the assignment, including the Introduction, Dataset Description, and Results sections, ensuring a "highly skewed distribution" was correctly explained. \[4\] I reviewed and modified the suggested text to ensure it accurately reflected my specific findings and maintained a consistent voice.

-   

-   \[3\] Develop code for data visualizations (Figures), specifically the LOESS smoothing plot, and provide advice on professional academic formatting such as removing internal titles and using Quarto cross-referencing. \[4\] I confirmed that the visualization parameters accurately represented the trends and distributions found in my data.

-   \[3\] Generate R code and formatting for all tables, including the primary "ROI Summary Table" with conditional formatting (red text for negative ROI) and the granular "ROI Check" mini-table. \[4\] I cross-checked the outputted summary statistics against the raw data to ensure accuracy.

-   \[3\] Troubleshoot technical issues regarding Quarto rendering (resolving "object not found" errors), cross-referencing, and Git connectivity within RStudio.

-   **\[3\] Documentation of AI Interactions:** Due to technical limitations in the chat platform, the full log of my interactions is documented in three parts within the supplementary files:

    1.  **Part 1:** Key interactions regarding data cleaning and initial visualization with Gemini are provided as screenshots in the following pages of this appendix.

    2.  **Part 2:** Subsequent full conversation logs with Gemini are documented in the separate file: "Gemini_chat.docx" .

    3.  **Part 3:** Full conversation logs and specific prompt iterations with Claude can be found at the following link: \[[HERE](https://claude.ai/share/3ae2791b-32fe-4d30-b1ab-ea2fac8d1a6d)\]

#### [**Documentation of AI Interactions: Part 1**]{.underline}

#### R code for data cleaning

![R code for data cleaning 1](images/cleaning_code1.png)

![R code for data cleaning 2](images/cleaning_code2.png)

![R code for data cleaning 3](images/cleaning_code3.png)

### Correct my tone and english writing in Dataset Introduction section git code for pushing, and check whether my writing is aligned to my code

![English writing and logic checking 1](images/correct_eng1.png)

![English writing and logic checking 2](images/correct_eng2.png)

![English writing and logic checking 3](images/correct_eng3.png)

### R code for data size

![using AI to produce R code for data size](images/data_size_code.png)

### Correct my tone and English writing in Dataset Introduction section

![Eng writing -Dataset Introduction section 1](images/clipboard-4106143212.png)

![Eng writing -Dataset Introduction section 2](images/clipboard-3819006291.png)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### R code for Dataset summaries (plot and table)

![R code for Dataset summaries (plot and table) 1](images/clipboard-3108136730.png)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

#### Transform my ideas about the plot and table into a report writing style.

![Transform my ideas about the plot and table into a report writing style. 1](images/clipboard-146613331.png)

![Transform my ideas about the plot and table into a report writing style. 2](images/clipboard-3815003983.png)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### R code for Result ( LOESS plot)

![LOESS R CODE](images/clipboard-3562268367.png)

#### Transform my ideas about the plot and table into a report writing style.

![Transform my ideas about the plot and table into a report writing style. 1](images/clipboard-2865604706.png)

![Transform my ideas about the plot and table into a report writing style. 2](images/螢幕擷取畫面%202026-04-02%20223545.png)

### R code for analysing ROI data

![](images/clipboard-4193233207.png)
